title: Ability to zoom in and out on uploaded images
excerpt:
Allow zooming on uploaded files, specifically images.

posts.author: marlissacalderon (Marlissa Calderon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow zooming on uploaded files, specifically images.

Currently the closest functionality to this is “Show original size” button but this usually goes to the extreme when larger files are uploaded. It’s difficult to give proper feedback when customized zoom options are not an option to use.

This is a big reason why some teams still use other project management tools over Monday.
